prompt: Show what would the current game interface be if the player clicks the chat bubble icon on the bottom left.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to display the game interface as it would appear immediately after the player clicks the chat bubble icon. This icon is located in the bottom-left corner of the screen in image 1, next to the player 'Josh (20)'. The edit should integrate a visible chat window or chat interface overlay onto the existing game screen, showing an active conversation area suitable for a mobile game, with space for text input and displayed messages.
objects: player avatar and status for 'You & June'
